title: Vietnam: Company Registration Website Now Available for New Labor Market Testing Requirements | Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy LLP
content:
## Vietnam: Company Registration Website Now Available for New Labor Market Testing Requirements
The Ho Chi Minh Department of Labor, Invalids and Social Affairs (DOLISA) has created a website for local companies (or their authorized representatives) to register themselves in accordance with the new labor market testing requirements that will go into effect on January 1, 2024. The website allows companies to post job openings for the required minimum of 15 days before seeking to hire foreign nationals. Additional guidance on exact requirements and information for the job postings are expected to be forthcoming.
We worked closely with Resident Vietnam in Vietnam to prepare this alert. This alert is for informational purposes only. If you have any questions, please contact the global immigration professional with whom you work at Fragomen or send an email to APCCInitiations@fragomen.com .
